employment_alert.title: Employment Verification Scam
employment_alert.description: This scenario demonstrates how publicly available employment information could be used to make a fraudulent message appear convincing.

template.subject: Security Notice Regarding Your {organization} Account
template.body: Hello {name}, this example demonstrates how someone could reference your publicly listed organization ({organization}) to make a fake message appear trustworthy. Be cautious of unexpected requests asking you to verify your account or click links.

location_awareness.title: Location-Based Scam
location_awareness.description: This scenario demonstrates how publicly shared location information may be referenced in fraudulent messages.

template.subject: Important Update for Residents of {location}
template.body: Hello {name}, this example shows how mentioning your public location ({location}) can make a message appear more relevant. Always verify the sender before taking any action.

contact_awareness.title: Contact Information Misuse
contact_awareness.description: This scenario demonstrates how exposed contact details can be used in targeted spam or phishing campaigns.

template.subject: Account Verification Reminder
template.body: Hello {name}, this educational example shows how publicly available contact information can be used to personalize fraudulent communications. Never share passwords or OTPs in response to unsolicited messages.

identity_awareness.title: Identity Profiling
identity_awareness.description: This scenario demonstrates how combining multiple personal details can help attackers build a convincing profile.

template.subject: Personal Information Exposure
template.body: This example illustrates how combining your name, location, workplace, and other publicly available information can make social engineering attacks more convincing.
